gain-creators.title: Gain Creators
gain-creators.prompt: How does your offer create a specific gain customers value? Add Bain value tags when useful.
examples: Audit-ready reports out of the box

pain-relievers.title: Pain Relievers
pain-relievers.prompt: How does your offer relieve a specific customer pain?
examples: Eliminates manual data re-entry between systems

products-and-services.title: Products & Services
products-and-services.prompt: What can customers actually buy, use, or experience?

gains.title: Gains
gains.prompt: What outcomes does the customer expect, desire, or love? Use Bain tags to separate functional, emotional, and social value.
examples: Spends less time on operations, more on strategy

pains.title: Pains
pains.prompt: Where does the customer hurt while getting the job done?

customer-jobs.title: Customer Jobs
customer-jobs.prompt: What job is the customer trying to get done?
examples: Justify the SaaS budget to the CFO
Sleep well knowing data is backed up
